---
name: Target proposal
about: Propose a new target for a PANTHEON season
title: "[target] "
labels: ["target-proposal", "needs-biosec-review"]
---

**Target id** (short slug, e.g. `cruzain`):

**Source** (PDB id or UniProt id):

**Disease / application context**:

**Intended use** — therapeutic binder? enzyme engineering? diagnostic reagent?

**Is the target on any controlled-agent list?**
- [ ] Australia Group
- [ ] HHS Select Agent List
- [ ] Federal Select Agent Program
- [ ] None that I know of

**Misuse considerations** — what is the worst-case misuse of a successful design against this target, and why is the design work still warranted?

**Wet-lab feasibility** — expression system, assay type, estimated cost.

**References** — at least two peer-reviewed citations.

---

*Biosecurity board review required. Do not open a PR for `seasons/<id>/config.yaml` until this issue is approved.*
